title: Acianthera chamelopoda
taxonomy: Acianthera chamelopoda is classified within the plant family Orchidaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Acianthera, which is a group of orchids. The species chamelopoda is a specific classification within this genus. Acianthera chamelopoda is further classified as a type of epiphytic orchid. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America.
